ddt:Target.Name: N_P13A_IDM_UDS_EIPF2_20190108
ddt:Target.email: OKUTSU, NATSUMI <okutsu-na@mail.nissan.co.jp>; DANG wei <wei-dang@mail.nissan.co.jp>; SHIOTA shingo <shiota-shingo@mail.nissan.co.jp>; HOSHINO makoto <hoshinom@mail.nissan.co.jp>
ddt:Target.Description:
[6] 2018/06/21 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Added, Modified, Deleted item FFD.
[5] 2018/06/15 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Deleted item FFD and AT. Modified DM.
[4] 2018/06/13 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo 1. Modified Received CANID. 2. Added ReadDTCInformation sub-function $04.
[3] 2018/06/08 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified DM, FFD, AT and Devices data.
[2] 2018/03/27 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Modified DM, FFD and Devices data.
[1] 2017/10/31 Nissan XX6 N.Okutsu Changed ReadDTC's 3rd byte to "AF".
[N] 2016/09/12 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Initial Creation.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: (TBD)exact torque request can not be achieved (measure imprecision)(01h)
(TBD)Request not using release condition VDC drive-off (01h)
(TBD) EPB braking request at fail / inhibit (01h)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000
